system_recommendation.executive_summary: Hormuz transit disruptions are now persistent with insurance premiums rising 40% for Gulf-origin crude cargoes. India's import-dependent economy should accelerate non-Gulf crude term contract negotiations and review SPR release triggers.

actual_outcome.documented_response: India's Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas held inter-ministerial meeting on crude supply security. PPAC reported sufficient stocks for 22 days. No SPR release authorised.
